T

targetRequest - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.Transfer
 
Transfer - Class in org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer
 
Transfer(TransferListener) - Constructor for class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.Transfer
This is a generic base class to be extended by other classes to create a complete transfer callflow.
transferAbandoned(SipServletRequest) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.TransferListener
This method is called to indicate that the transferee has hung up during the transfer process.
transferAbandoned(SipServletRequest) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferServlet
 
transferAllRequests - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferSettings
 
transferCompleted(SipServletResponse) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.TransferListener
This method is called after the transfer target has accepted the call.
transferCompleted(SipServletResponse) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferServlet
 
TransferCondition - Class in org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer
 
TransferCondition() - Constructor for class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.TransferCondition
 
TransferCondition(TransferSettings.TransferStyle, Condition) - Constructor for class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.TransferCondition
 
transferConditions - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferSettings
 
transferDeclined(SipServletResponse) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.TransferListener
This method is called to indicate that the transfer target did not accept the call.
transferDeclined(SipServletResponse) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferServlet
 
transfereeRequest - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.Transfer
 
TransferInitialInvite - Class in org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer
 
TransferInitialInvite() - Constructor for class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.TransferInitialInvite
 
transferInitiated(SipServletRequest) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.TransferListener
This method is invoked by one of the Transfer callflows to indicate an INVITE is being sent to the transfer target.
transferInitiated(SipServletRequest) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferServlet
 
transferListener - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.Transfer
 
TransferListener - Interface in org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer
 
transferorRequest - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.transfer.Transfer
 
TransferServlet - Class in org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer
This class implements an example B2BUA with transfer capabilities.
